message:
⚡ Improve dashboard data loading performance (#459)

Performance optimizations:
- Increase health check concurrency from 2 to 6 (3x faster)
- Increase kubectlProxy max concurrent requests from 2 to 4
- Add debounced localStorage writes to prevent main thread blocking
- Simplify distribution detection (remove slow backend fallbacks)
- Add centralized TIMEOUT_CONFIG for consistent behavior
- Mark timeout errors as definitive for immediate offline status

UI improvements:
- Show loading indicator in Workloads card during data fetch
- Only show Compute error when no data is available
- Demo mode fallbacks only apply in demo mode

Fixes:
- Clusters with timeout errors now show as "offline" immediately
- Various catch blocks check demo mode before falling back to demo data

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

   // Filter out clusters where workload is already deployed and unavailable clusters
